blurb: Ofcom is the UK regulator for communications services and the online safety regulator under the Online Safety Act.

publications.title: Statement: Protecting people from illegal harms online
publications.summary: Ofcom's first-edition illegal harms policy statement, codes of practice and risk assessment guidance setting out online services' duties under the Online Safety Act.

notes: Regulator/Online Safety Act site. Date 2024-12-16 from the page's og:published_time meta tag. The /online-safety/ index is a hub with no dated items; only the illegal harms statement carried a clear first-party publication date.
